title: Events
subtitle: Group expenses into events — see the debt balance and close an event when it's done.

list.caption: Events list
list.name: Name
list.emptyBody: Create your first event to group expenses together.
list.noMatchesBody: Try changing the status filter to see more events.

detail.closedBody: This event is closed and can't be reopened. All expense and share changes are locked — only viewing, CSV export, and the settled toggle remain.

balance.title: Debt balance
balance.caption: The event's debt balance
balance.emptyTitle: No expenses in this event yet
balance.emptyBody: The balance appears once the event has expenses. Assign an expense to start.

expensesSection.title: Expenses in this event
expensesSection.caption: The expenses in this event
expensesSection.name: Name
expensesSection.emptyTitle: No expenses in this event yet
expensesSection.emptyBody: Use “Assign expense” to add loose expenses within the event's date range.
expensesSection.emptyClosedBody: This event is closed and has no expenses.
expensesSection.closedNote: The event is closed — expenses can't be added or removed.

assign.title: Assign an expense to “{{name}}”
assign.hintInRange: Choose a loose expense whose time falls within the event's date range.
assign.emptyBody: Only loose expenses whose time falls within the event's date range appear here. Adjust the event's dates or create a new expense.
assign.noMatchesBody: No matching expense found. Try a different search.

close.title: Close “{{name}}”?
close.subtitle: Closing an event is a ONE-WAY action — it can't be reopened.
close.warningTitle: Once closed, the event is locked
close.body: All expense and share changes for the event will be locked — only viewing, CSV export, and the “settled” toggle remain. You can no longer add, remove, or edit expenses in this event.
close.acknowledge: I understand this event can't be reopened after closing.

delete.title: Delete {{name}}?
delete.body: The event will be permanently deleted. Its expenses are NOT deleted — they become loose (not in any event).

limit.title: Open-event limit reached
limit.body: Your Free account has reached the maximum number of open events. Close an event or upgrade to Premium to remove the limit. Existing data is unaffected.
